value: Nursing and Midwifery Board of Australia
Abu Dhabi residency: OET >= C for international graduates.
Dubai residency: OET = 300 (C+ in all categories).
UK NMC registration: reading/listening/speaking >= B and writing >= C+.
Australia NMBA registration: minimum B in each of the four components.
UAE route language cannot use a universal Grade B threshold.
GCC-wide scope is not publicly verified.
Pass guarantee and curriculum-design claims are not externally verified.
Is GCC scope an intentional market boundary or only a legacy assumption?
Should marketing copy mention UK/Australia only at the jurisdiction-specific threshold level?
Are the 15-24 corrected letters and cohort size still active course-design facts?
Is any pass guarantee currently part of the live offer?

pricing_or_offer_proof: The current validated layer proves exam-route pressure more clearly than a fragmented prep-provider map.

value.takeaway: The nursing OET route is real, but operator fragmentation is not yet captured cleanly in the validated card layer.
value.why_not_stronger: A validated prep-provider set has not yet been written into the card.
